div.p: Hardware-Handled Fields The NIC processes these automatically — your code never sees them:

ul.li: SFD: Start Frame Delimiter marks end of preamble
FCS: CRC-32 error detection, NIC drops bad frames

div.p: TAP Device Delivers Your userspace code receives starting at:

g.text: (Preamble: 7B + SFD: 1B + IFG: 12B not counted in frame size)
